queries.intent: Which function performs an O(n) token distribution loop that impacts gas cost?

correctAnswer.summary: distribute loops over recipients and performs a transfer for each recipient, so gas scales linearly with recipient count.
mustIncludeFacts: distribute contains a for loop over recipients.
mustNotClaim: The function is constant-time regardless of recipients length.
acceptableVariations: Gas grows with recipients array length due to per-recipient transfer loop.
